data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence regarding the split payment functionality.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not confirm whether the system supports splitting payments between two cards, which is the core requirement of the exploratory step. While the linked use case discusses various payment scenarios, it lacks specific details or API evidence that demonstrate the implementation of the split payment feature. Therefore, without concrete evidence, the validation of this exploratory step remains inconclusive.
gaps: No evidence of split payment functionality between two cards.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for split payment functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the ability to split payments between two cards.
